], ], 'Volume' => [ 'type' => 'long', ], 'VolumeStatistics' => [ 'type' => 'structure', 'members' => [ 'InboxRawCount' => [ 'shape' => 'Volume', ], 'SpamRawCount' => [ 'shape' => 'Volume', ], 'ProjectedInbox' => [ 'shape' => 'Volume', ], 'ProjectedSpam' => [ 'shape' => 'Volume', ], ], ], 'WarmupStatus' => [ 'type' => 'string', 'enum' => [ 'IN_PROGRESS', 'DONE', 'NOT_APPLICABLE', ], ], 'WebsiteURL' => [ 'type' => 'string', 'max' => 1000, 'min' => 1, 'pattern' => '^(([^:/?#]+):)?(//([^/?#]*))?([^?#]*)(\\?([^#]*))?(#(.*))?', 'sensitive' => true, ], ],];
